item.title: Does a Drill Push a Boat?
item.description: We had to try it just to see how ridiculous the answer would be. A simple test to see whether a drill can actually push a boat. What do you think the result will be?

media:content.media:title: Does a Drill Push a Boat?
media:content.media:description: We had to try it just to see how ridiculous the answer would be. A simple test to see whether a drill can actually push a boat. What do you think the result will be?

item.title: Will It Run After 7 Years?
item.description: One key turn shows whether this old iron gets a second chance after sitting forgotten for seven years. A simple start test, but an important one for any diesel project. Will it fire up?

media:content.media:title: Will It Run After 7 Years?
media:content.media:description: One key turn shows whether this old iron gets a second chance after sitting forgotten for seven years. A simple start test, but an important one for any diesel project. Will it fire up?

item.title: The Forgotten ’87 Kenworth Roars Again
item.description: After years of sitting silent and forgotten, this 1987 Kenworth gets a second chance at life. With determination, mechanical know-how, and a little luck, the classic truck is brought back to life—proving that some legends never truly fade.

media:content.media:title: The Forgotten ’87 Kenworth Roars Again
media:content.media:description: After years of sitting silent and forgotten, this 1987 Kenworth gets a second chance at life. With determination, mechanical know-how, and a little luck, the classic truck is brought back to life—proving that some legends never truly fade.

item.title: King Ranch inside, CAT 3126 underhood
item.description: A Ford F-350 combines the comfort of a King Ranch interior with the rugged performance of a CAT 3126 engine swap. It's a unique blend of refinement and serious diesel power.

media:content.media:title: King Ranch inside, CAT 3126 underhood
media:content.media:description: A Ford F-350 combines the comfort of a King Ranch interior with the rugged performance of a CAT 3126 engine swap. It's a unique blend of refinement and serious diesel power.

item.title: Mental Health Matters
item.description: A reminder that strength includes speaking up, seeking support, and looking after your well-being. Every conversation helps break the stigma and encourages others to do the same.

media:content.media:title: Mental Health Matters
media:content.media:description: A reminder that strength includes speaking up, seeking support, and looking after your well-being. Every conversation helps break the stigma and encourages others to do the same.

item.title: Can You Legally Move This Abandoned Lowboy?
item.description: An abandoned lowboy trailer raises questions about ownership, liability, and what it takes to legally move it. Where does recovery end and legal responsibility begin?

media:content.media:title: Can You Legally Move This Abandoned Lowboy?
media:content.media:description: An abandoned lowboy trailer raises questions about ownership, liability, and what it takes to legally move it. Where does recovery end and legal responsibility begin?

item.title: Abandoned Boom Lift Won’t Budge — Why?
item.description: An abandoned boom lift refuses to move, turning a simple recovery into a mechanical mystery. Is it a seized component, a hydraulic issue, or something even more complicated?

media:content.media:title: Abandoned Boom Lift Won’t Budge — Why?
media:content.media:description: An abandoned boom lift refuses to move, turning a simple recovery into a mechanical mystery. Is it a seized component, a hydraulic issue, or something even more complicated?

item.title: This Kenworth Sat 25 Years. Hear It Now
item.description: A Kenworth truck that has been sitting for 25 years is brought back to life, revealing whether its engine and systems can still run after decades of inactivity. What condition is it really in?

media:content.media:title: This Kenworth Sat 25 Years. Hear It Now
media:content.media:description: A Kenworth truck that has been sitting for 25 years is brought back to life, revealing whether its engine and systems can still run after decades of inactivity. What condition is it really in?

item.title: Rust Be Gone: Cheap Rust Removal
item.description: A simple and affordable rust removal method is put to the test, showing how corrosion can be treated without expensive equipment. Does it actually restore the metal or just clean the surface?

media:content.media:title: Rust Be Gone: Cheap Rust Removal
media:content.media:description: A simple and affordable rust removal method is put to the test, showing how corrosion can be treated without expensive equipment. Does it actually restore the metal or just clean the surface?

item.title: RAM Update: Where Things Stand
item.description: An update on the RAM project and where things stand right now. Focused on the current build status and next steps in the garage. What’s the latest on your end?

media:content.media:title: RAM Update: Where Things Stand
media:content.media:description: An update on the RAM project and where things stand right now. Focused on the current build status and next steps in the garage. What’s the latest on your end?

item.title: Here's How Canada Could Dodge EPA Rules
item.description: A look at how Canada could potentially avoid EPA rules, with a focus on the technical and regulatory side of the discussion. What would that mean for builds and swaps?

media:content.media:title: Here's How Canada Could Dodge EPA Rules
media:content.media:description: A look at how Canada could potentially avoid EPA rules, with a focus on the technical and regulatory side of the discussion. What would that mean for builds and swaps?

item.title: The Beast That Trench-Dug Its Own Exit!
item.description: A hands-on garage look at the build and mechanical work behind this beast and how it trench-dug its own exit. What happened next?

media:content.media:title: The Beast That Trench-Dug Its Own Exit!
media:content.media:description: A hands-on garage look at the build and mechanical work behind this beast and how it trench-dug its own exit. What happened next?

item.title: Truck Only Drives in Fwd After Rear Diff Issue!
item.description: A truck is only driving in forward after a rear differential issue. This video follows the diagnosis and repair process to get the drivetrain working properly again. What caused the problem?

media:content.media:title: Truck Only Drives in Fwd After Rear Diff Issue!
media:content.media:description: A truck is only driving in forward after a rear differential issue. This video follows the diagnosis and repair process to get the drivetrain working properly again. What caused the problem?
